front: What are the key milestones in peptide history?
back: 1882: First peptide synthesis (Theodor Curtius). 1901: First hormone isolation (secretin, Bayliss & Starling). 1921: Insulin isolation (Banting & Best). 1953: First total protein synthesis (Vincent du Vigneaud, oxytocin). 1963: Solid-phase peptide synthesis (Robert Merrifield). 1977: Recombinant DNA technology.
